summary: Published runtime capability surface for deterministic audio editing and Layer 1 effect processing in the current repository.
limitations: Most operations currently support full_file targets only.
time_stretch is runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.
Transient shaping, clipping, and gating are runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.
Layer 1 ambience, texture, and modulation effects are runtime-available but not yet selected by the baseline planner.

operations.name: gain
operations.summary: Apply explicit gain change in decibels.

parameters.name: gain_db
parameters.description: Gain adjustment in decibels.

operations.name: normalize
operations.summary: Apply peak normalization using caller-supplied peak measurements.
planner_notes: Not chosen by the baseline planner without explicit technical intent.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Normalization mode.

parameters.name: target_peak_dbfs
parameters.description: Requested post-normalization peak level.

parameters.name: measured_peak_dbfs
parameters.description: Measured current peak level used to compute gain.

operations.name: trim
operations.summary: Trim the clip by explicit start and end times.

parameters.name: start_seconds
parameters.description: Trim start time in seconds.

parameters.name: end_seconds
parameters.description: Trim end time in seconds.

operations.name: fade
operations.summary: Apply fade-in and/or fade-out at clip boundaries.

parameters.name: fade_in_seconds
parameters.description: Fade-in duration.

parameters.name: fade_out_seconds
parameters.description: Fade-out duration.

operations.name: parametric_eq
operations.summary: Apply one or more bell EQ bands.

parameters.name: bands
parameters.description: Non-empty array of bell-band objects with type, frequency_hz, gain_db, and q.

operations.name: high_pass_filter
operations.summary: Remove low-frequency content below a cutoff frequency.

parameters.name: frequency_hz
parameters.description: High-pass cutoff frequency.

operations.name: low_pass_filter
operations.summary: Remove high-frequency content above a cutoff frequency.

parameters.name: frequency_hz
parameters.description: Low-pass cutoff frequency.

operations.name: compressor
operations.summary: Apply downward RMS-style compression with explicit timing and ratio.

parameters.name: threshold_db
parameters.description: Compression threshold.

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.description: Compression ratio.

parameters.name: attack_ms
parameters.description: Compressor attack time.

parameters.name: release_ms
parameters.description: Compressor release time.

parameters.name: makeup_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional post-compression makeup gain.

operations.name: limiter
operations.summary: Apply a peak limiter with explicit ceiling and timing controls.

parameters.name: ceiling_dbtp
parameters.description: True-peak ceiling.

parameters.name: release_ms
parameters.description: Limiter release time.

parameters.name: lookahead_ms
parameters.description: Limiter lookahead time.

operations.name: transient_shaper
operations.summary: Emphasize or soften attack transients with explicit threshold and timing controls.
planner_notes: Runtime-available but not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: attack_amount_db
parameters.description: Signed transient attack emphasis amount.

parameters.name: threshold_db
parameters.description: Threshold above which the transient emphasis engages.

parameters.name: attack_ms
parameters.description: Transient detector attack time.

parameters.name: release_ms
parameters.description: Transient detector release time.

operations.name: clipper
operations.summary: Apply deterministic hard clipping with explicit ceiling and oversampling.
planner_notes: Runtime-available but not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: ceiling_dbfs
parameters.description: Clipping ceiling.

parameters.name: input_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional gain applied before clipping.

parameters.name: output_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional gain applied after clipping.

parameters.name: oversample_factor
parameters.description: Oversampling factor used by the clipping stage.

operations.name: gate
operations.summary: Apply downward gating to low-level content with explicit threshold and timing.
planner_notes: Runtime-available but not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: threshold_db
parameters.description: Gate threshold.

parameters.name: range_db
parameters.description: Maximum attenuation applied below threshold.

parameters.name: ratio
parameters.description: Gate expansion ratio.

parameters.name: attack_ms
parameters.description: Gate attack time.

parameters.name: release_ms
parameters.description: Gate release time.

operations.name: time_stretch
operations.summary: Change duration while preserving pitch through deterministic tempo chaining.
planner_notes: Runtime-available but not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: stretch_ratio
parameters.description: Output duration divided by input duration.

operations.name: stereo_width
operations.summary: Widen or narrow an existing stereo image conservatively.

parameters.name: width_multiplier
parameters.description: Stereo width multiplier.

operations.name: denoise
operations.summary: Apply conservative broadband denoise aimed at steady background noise.

parameters.name: reduction_db
parameters.description: Broadband noise reduction amount.

parameters.name: noise_floor_dbfs
parameters.description: Optional steady-noise floor estimate used by the runtime.

operations.name: reverb
operations.summary: Apply a layered echo-based reverb with explicit pre-delay, spacing, tap count, and decay.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: pre_delay_ms
parameters.description: Delay before the first reverb reflection.

parameters.name: reflection_spacing_ms
parameters.description: Spacing between successive synthetic reflection taps.

parameters.name: tail_taps
parameters.description: Number of generated reflection taps in the tail.

parameters.name: decay
parameters.description: Base decay factor applied to the reflection tail.

parameters.name: dry_mix
parameters.description: Optional dry contribution mixed with the reverb tail.

parameters.name: wet_mix
parameters.description: Optional wet contribution mixed back from the reverb tail.

operations.name: delay
operations.summary: Apply a straightforward single-repeat delay with explicit dry and wet mix.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: delay_ms
parameters.description: Delay time before the repeated signal returns.

parameters.name: dry_mix
parameters.description: Optional dry contribution preserved alongside the delay return.

parameters.name: wet_mix
parameters.description: Optional wet contribution returned from the delayed branch.

operations.name: echo
operations.summary: Apply an echo with explicit delay, decay, and dry/wet balance controls.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: delay_ms
parameters.description: Delay time before the first audible echo repeat.

parameters.name: decay
parameters.description: Relative decay applied to each repeated echo.

parameters.name: dry_mix
parameters.description: Optional dry contribution sent around the echo path.

parameters.name: wet_mix
parameters.description: Optional wet contribution returned from the echo path.

operations.name: bitcrush
operations.summary: Apply bit-depth reduction with explicit sample hold, blend, and crusher mode.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: bit_depth
parameters.description: Target crushed bit depth.

parameters.name: sample_hold_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples held before the crusher updates again.

parameters.name: mix
parameters.description: Optional wet/dry crusher blend.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Crusher transfer curve mode.

operations.name: distortion
operations.summary: Apply stronger nonlinear drive for intentionally obvious harmonic distortion.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: drive_db
parameters.description: Input drive amount pushed into the distortion stage.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Soft-clip threshold used by the distortion stage.

parameters.name: output_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional output trim applied after distortion.

parameters.name: oversample_factor
parameters.description: Optional oversampling factor for the distortion backend.

operations.name: saturation
operations.summary: Apply gentler harmonic drive intended for thickening rather than aggressive clipping.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: drive_db
parameters.description: Input drive amount pushed into the saturation stage.

parameters.name: curve
parameters.description: Named soft-clip curve used for the saturation stage.

parameters.name: output_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional output trim applied after saturation.

parameters.name: oversample_factor
parameters.description: Optional oversampling factor for the saturation backend.

operations.name: flanger
operations.summary: Apply a short modulated comb effect with explicit depth and sweep rate.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: delay_ms
parameters.description: Base delay of the flanger comb path.

parameters.name: depth_ms
parameters.description: Maximum modulation depth of the delayed comb path.

parameters.name: rate_hz
parameters.description: LFO sweep rate of the flange modulation.

parameters.name: feedback_percent
parameters.description: Feedback amount of the modulated comb path.

parameters.name: mix_percent
parameters.description: Width or wet mix amount used by the flanger backend.

parameters.name: waveform
parameters.description: LFO waveform for the flange sweep.

operations.name: phaser
operations.summary: Apply a moving phase-shift effect with explicit delay, decay, and sweep rate.
planner_notes: Runtime-available Layer 1 effect. Not yet chosen by the baseline planner.

parameters.name: input_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional input gain sent into the phaser network.

parameters.name: output_gain_db
parameters.description: Optional output gain returned from the phaser network.

parameters.name: delay_ms
parameters.description: Internal phase-network delay.

parameters.name: decay
parameters.description: Decay or resonance amount inside the phase network.

parameters.name: rate_hz
parameters.description: LFO sweep rate of the phase modulation.

parameters.name: waveform
parameters.description: LFO waveform for the phaser sweep.
